speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Time for The Scoreboard with news that'll warm any sports fan's heart. The Denver Pioneers have won their third NCAA men's hockey title in just five years - talk about building a dynasty in the ice rinks of America.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] In the WNBA, history's being made - Azzi Fudd was drafted first overall by the Dallas Wings on Monday and she's set to become the highest-paid rookie to ever enter the league. The future of women's basketball is looking bright and profitable.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And Barcelona are gearing up for their Champions League quarterfinal second leg against Atlético Madrid at the Metropolitano tonight. After training at the stadium yesterday, they're ready for what coach Hansi Flick called 'the big clash' - their sixth and final meeting with Atlético this season.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] From college ice hockey to professional basketball to European football - sport keeps showing us that excellence is about showing up when it matters most. That is why we love sport.
